series_metadata.series_description: Consists of individual packages of information used during the deputy registrar selection process. The proposal forms contain personal information (social security numbers, credit reports, police reports, home address and telephone numbers). The non-personal information consists of memos, notification letters, RTP billing, proposal requests, mailing lists, evaluations, scoring, final selection notices by the Director and Registrar, timelines, telephone Q & A lists, and agency boundary information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: date of file creation. ; Electronic: date of file creation
